description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet featuring a dark brown frame with contrasting light wood drawer fronts. The cabinet has three smaller drawers stacked above a larger bottom drawer, all of which are slightly recessed and lack visible handles, giving it a minimalist appearance. The sides are solid and flat, while the back is a continuous dark wood panel with visible joinery details. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small items. The drawers appear to be functional and provide storage space, making the cabinet suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or entryways. The overall construction suggests durability and a rustic, utilitarian style.
description: A compact, rustic wooden cabinet with three small drawers and one large bottom drawer, featuring a dark brown frame and light wood drawer fronts. The design is minimalist and functional, with a flat top and solid sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing three small drawers and one large bottom drawer with contrasting light wood fronts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the open drawer structure, with no visible handles.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a solid dark wood panel with joinery details and no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth and open drawer structure.
